data.body: EPIC r5 -> 1 BLOCK (G6): existing rebar-mcp is stdio-only; AC5 assumed HTTP+SigV4. Remediated: trusted remote path = library-mode HTTP service (rebar-as-library per review_bot pattern, NOT stdio MCP) behind AWS API Gateway (SigV4 integration point); local path stays offline stdio rebar-mcp. Fixed epic AC5 + ee0b. 368c PASSED r4 (certified). Epic r6 running bk5efj4d2. Once epic PASSES, claim 368c.
